review_scope: RWA receipt custody and registry-state provenance
RWA receipt enforceability and jurisdiction boundary
notes: This file is a template, not production evidence.
A real report must come from an external legal, registry, or custodian reviewer and must not be a local fixture or NovaSeal/CellScript self-attestation.
NovaSeal does not verify off-chain title, custody, registry state, market price, legal enforceability, or oracle facts in-script.

The request_handoff block must reference the current target/novaseal-external-evidence-handoff-bundle.json hash, blake2b-256(person=NovaExtHandoff) hash algorithm, and rwa_legal_registry_review_evidence group.
